name: Example External Parser Bridge

external_dependencies.name: external-parser-name
external_dependencies.license: verify upstream license before release packaging

permissions.credentials: not allowed unless documented by the adapter

safety_rules: Do not mutate the original source file.
Do not treat parser output as analysis or verified truth.
Preserve exact coordinates and values when available.
Store confidence and provenance for every derived record.
Fail gracefully when the external parser is missing.
